title: salix × grahamii
intro: Salix × grahamii, also known as Graham's willow or Graham's willow hybrid, is a hybrid plant species created by crossing the weeping willow (Salix babylonica) with the coyote willow (Salix exigua). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Salix × grahamii include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems.
